attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT ECPSLS.DEAL_ID, ECPSLS.OBJECT_ID, ECPSLS.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID, ECPSLS.SCENARIO_OBJECT_ID,
   ECPSLS.LINE_NUMBER, ECPSLS.SOURCE_TYPE, ECPSLS.LINE_TYPE, ECPSLS.PART_NUMBER,
   ECPSLS.PART_CATEGORY, ECPSLS.DESCRIPTION, ECPSLS.QUANTITY, ECPSLS.DURATION,
   ECPSLS.REFERENCE_LIST_PRICE, ECPSLS.LIST_PRICE, ECPSLS.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE,
   ECPSLS.DISCOUNT_RATE, ECPSLS.NS_DISCOUNT_RATE, ECPSLS.DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE,
   ECPSLS.NS_DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE, ECPSLS.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT, ECPSLS.NS_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT,
   ECPSLS.NET_PRICE, ECPSLS.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE, ECPSLS.STANDARD_COST,
   ECPSLS.EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST, ECPSLS.OVERHEAD, ECPSLS.EXTENDED_OVERHEAD,
   ECPSLS.ROYALTY, ECPSLS.EXTENDED_ROYALTY, ECPSLS.ROYALTY_EXPRESSION,
   ECPSLS.SOURCE_LINE_ID, ECPSLS.PARENT_SOURCE_LINE_ID, ECPSLS.MINOR_CONFIGURABLE,
   ECPSLS.PART_MAJOR_FAMILY_ID, ECPSLS.PART_MAJOR_FAMILY_NAME, ECPSLS.SOURCE_OBJECT_ID,
   ECPSLS.REFERENCE_LINE_OBJECT_ID, ECPSLS.STATUS, ECPSLS.STATUS_MESSAGE,
   ECPSLS.ACTIVE, ECPSLS.CREATED_BY, ECPSLS.CREATED_ON, ECPSLS.UPDATED_BY,
   ECPSLS.UPDATED_ON, ECPSLS.GPL_LIST_PRICE, ECPSLS.UPLIFT_FACTOR,
   ECPSLS.EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_EXCLUDE_MYD, ECPSLS.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD,
   ECPSLS.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_NS, ECPSLS.FINAL_DISC, ECPSLS.FINAL_NET_PRICE,
   ECPSLS.ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT, ECPSLS.NEGOTIATED_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   ECPSLS.NEGOTIATED_DISCOUNT, ECPSLS.NEGOTIATED_NS_DISCOUNT, ECPSLS.SW_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE,
   ECPSLS.MLB_INDICATOR, ECPSLS.CONTRACTUAL_DISC, ECPSLS.ERP_PRODUCT_FAMILY,
   ECPSLS.TOTAL_COST, ECPSLS.EXT_TOTAL_COST, ECPSLS.FA_DISC_APPROVED,
   ECPSLS.TEP_FLG, ECPSLS.TAA_FLG, ECPSLS.FULFILLMENT_TYPE, ECPSLS.EXT_LIST_PRICE,
   ECPSLS.SOURCE_PRODUCT_TYPE, ECPSLS.IS_XAAS_SKU, ECPSLS.SBP_FLAG,
   ECPSLS.SBP_LINE_OBJECT_ID, ECPSLS.DECIMAL_EXPANSION_VALUE, ECPSLS.SSVW_UPDATED_ON,
   ECPSLS.OVERRIDE_ROYALTY_FLG, ECPSLS.OVERRIDE_STANDARD_COST_FLG,
   ECPSLS.OVERRIDE_OVERHEAD_FLG, ECPSLS.OVERRIDE_LIST_PRICE_FLG,
   ECPSLS.OVERRIDE_EXT_NET_PRICE_FLG, ECPSLS.OVERRIDE_DISCOUNT_FLG ,
 /*added below 7 columns as part of EPS_HANA_DEAL_FOUNDATION*/
 ECPSLS.CONSTRUCT_TYPE,
 ECPSLS.ATTRIBUTION_METHODOLOGY,
 ECPSLS.SINGLE_SKU_LINE_TYPE,
 ECPSLS.ATTRIBUTION_REQUIRED,
 ECPSLS.OA_PROXY_LIST_PRICE,
 ECPSLS.OA_LIST_PRICE,
 ECPSLS.OA_NET_PRICE,
 ECPSLS.WF_PRICED,
 ECPSLS.PROMO_DISC,
 /*added below 24 columns as part of PRICING SCENARIO LINE ENHANCEMENTS*/
 ECPSLS.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
 ECPSLS.GLOB_PRC_LST_EXTND_LST_USD_PRC,
 ECPSLS.TOTAL_PURCH_ADJ_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
 ECPSLS.OA_SUCCESS_FLG,
 ECPSLS.UI_HIDE_FLG,
 ECPSLS.SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
 ECPSLS.PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 ECPSLS.CHARGE_TYPE_NAME,
 ECPSLS.INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 ECPSLS.REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 ECPSLS.ACTION_TAG_NAME,
 ECPSLS.BILLING_MODEL_NAME,
 ECPSLS.RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
 ECPSLS.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NAME,
 ECPSLS.AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 ECPSLS.PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 ECPSLS.RATE_TABLE_NAME,
 ECPSLS.SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
 ECPSLS.SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
 ECPSLS.SUBSCRPITION_START_DT,
 ECPSLS.USAGE_QUANTITY,
 ECPSLS.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
 ECPSLS.COUNTRY_ENABLMENT_COST_USD_AMT,
 ECPSLS.SERVICE_USD_COST,
 ECPSLS.NOAH_FLAG,
 ECPSLS.XAAS_COMMITED_PARENT_ID,
 ECPSLS.SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
 ECPSLS.EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
 ECPSLS.SS_CODE
 FROM 
  $$EXCEPDB.EX_CQ_PUBLD_SCN_LNE_SCNRO ECPSLS
  WHERE ECPSLS.SS_CODE in ('CCW', 'CCWR')
  and
  NOT EXISTS
 (
     SELECT 1 
     FROM $$STGDB.ST_CQ_PUBLISHED_SCEN_LINE SCPSL
     WHERE SCPSL.OBJECT_ID= ECPSLS.OBJECT_ID
     and SCPSL.SS_CODE = ECPSLS.SS_CODE
 )

SELECT
SPSL.PRICING_SCENARIO_LN_KEY AS PRICING_SCENARIO_LN_KEY,
CASE WHEN SCPSL.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID IS NULL THEN -999 ELSE SP.PRICING_SCENARIO_LN_KEY END AS PARENT_PRICING_SCENARIO_LN_KEY,
COALESCE(NPS.PRICING_SCENARIO_KEY,-999) AS PRICING_SCENARIO_KEY,
SCPSL.LINE_NUMBER AS LINE_NUM,
COALESCE(EL_BOM.LOV_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') AS LINE_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(EL_SRC.LOV_VALUE,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(SCPSL.QUANTITY,0) > 2147483647 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(SCPSL.QUANTITY,0) END AS ITEM_QTY,
CAST(SCPSL.DURATION AS INTEGER) AS PRD_DUR_DAYS_COUNT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS SCENARIO_LN_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(SCPSL.STANDARD_COST,0) AS STANDARD_COST_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST,0) AS EXTND_STANDARD_COST_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.OVERHEAD,0) AS OVERHEAD_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_OVERHEAD,0) AS EXTND_OVERHEAD_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.ROYALTY,0) AS ROYALTY_USD_AMT,
CAST(CASE
   WHEN SCPSL.LINE_TYPE IN (2, 3, 6, 7, 36, 38)
   THEN CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.ROYALTY, 0) AS FLOAT)
   ELSE CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.ROYALTY, 0) AS FLOAT) * CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.QUANTITY, 0) AS FLOAT)
END AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS EXTND_ROYALTY_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.LIST_PRICE,0) AS LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE,0) AS EXTND_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
-- COALESCE(SCPSL.NET_PRICE,0) AS NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,
CAST(CASE
    WHEN SCPSL.LINE_TYPE IN (1, 3, 4, 6, 36)
    THEN CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.LIST_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT) - (CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.LIST_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT) * CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD, 0) AS FLOAT))
    WHEN (SCPSL.line_type = 0 OR SCPSL.line_type IS NULL)
    THEN 0.0
    ELSE CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT)
END AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE,0) AS EXTND_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.GPL_LIST_PRICE,0) AS GLOBAL_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
CAST(CASE
    WHEN TRIM(ND.DEAL_TYPE) IN ('2','5')
    THEN CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT) /
         COALESCE(NULLIF(CASE
            WHEN (SCPSL.GPL_LIST_PRICE IS NOT NULL AND SCPSL.UPLIFT_FACTOR IS NULL)
            THEN COALESCE(CAST(SCPSL.LIST_PRICE AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(CAST(SCPSL.GPL_LIST_PRICE AS FLOAT), 0.0), 1.0)
            WHEN (SCPSL.GPL_LIST_PRICE IS NULL AND SCPSL.UPLIFT_FACTOR IS NOT NULL)
            THEN CAST(SCPSL.UPLIFT_FACTOR AS FLOAT)
            WHEN (SCPSL.GPL_LIST_PRICE IS NULL AND SCPSL.UPLIFT_FACTOR IS NULL)
            THEN 1.0
            ELSE CASE WHEN SCPSL.UPLIFT_FACTOR = 0 THEN 1.0 ELSE CAST(SCPSL.UPLIFT_FACTOR AS FLOAT) END
         END, 0.0), 1.0)
    ELSE CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.GPL_LIST_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT) * CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.QUANTITY, 0) AS FLOAT)
END AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS EXTND_GLOBAL_LST_PRICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.FINAL_NET_PRICE,0) AS FINAL_EXTND_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,
-- COALESCE(SCPSL.DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE,0) AS STANDARD_DISCOUNT_PCT,      
CASE WHEN SCPSL.LINE_TYPE IN (1, 3, 4, 6, 36, 2, 7, 5, 38) THEN CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD, 0) * 100 AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END AS STANDARD_DISCOUNT_PCT,
-- COALESCE(SCPSL.NS_DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE,0) AS NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_PCT,
CASE WHEN SCPSL.LINE_TYPE IN (1, 3, 4, 6, 36, 2, 7, 5, 38) THEN CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.NS_DISCOUNT_RATE, 0) * 100 AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END AS NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_PCT,
-- COALESCE(SCPSL.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT,0) AS STANDARD_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT, 
CAST(COALESCE(CASE
    WHEN SCPSL.LINE_TYPE IN (1, 3, 4, 6, 36)
    THEN CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.QUANTITY, 0) AS FLOAT) * CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.LIST_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT) * CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD, 0) AS FLOAT)
    WHEN SCPSL.LINE_TYPE IN (2, 7, 5, 38)
    THEN (CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(1.0 - CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD, 0) AS FLOAT), 0.0)) - CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT)
    ELSE 0.0
END, 0.0) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS STANDARD_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
-- COALESCE(SCPSL.NS_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT,0) AS NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
CAST(COALESCE(CASE
    WHEN SCPSL.LINE_TYPE IN (1, 3, 4, 6, 36)
    THEN CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.QUANTITY, 0) AS FLOAT) * CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.LIST_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT) * CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.NS_DISCOUNT_RATE, 0) AS FLOAT)
    WHEN SCPSL.line_type IN (2, 7, 5, 38)
    THEN (CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(1.0 - CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.NS_DISCOUNT_RATE, 0) AS FLOAT), 0.0)) - CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT)
    ELSE 0.0
END, 0.0) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.NEGOTIATED_NET_PRICE_AMT,0) AS NEGOTIATED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT,
CAST(CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.NEGOTIATED_DISCOUNT, 0) AS FLOAT) * CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS NEGOTIATED_STD_DSCNT_USD_AMT,
CAST(CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.NEGOTIATED_NS_DISCOUNT, 0) AS FLOAT) * CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS NEGOTIATED_NONSTD_DSCNTUSD_AMT,
CAST(CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.FINAL_DISC, 0) AS FLOAT) * CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS FINAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD,0) AS TRADE_IN_UNIT_CRDT_STD_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_NS,0) AS TRADE_IN_UNT_CRDTNONSTDUSD_AMT,
CAST(CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.FA_DISC_APPROVED, 0) AS FLOAT) * CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE, 0) AS FLOAT) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS FRAME_AGRMNTAPRVD_DSCNTUSD_AMT,
CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.CONTRACTUAL_DISC,0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS CONTRACTUAL_DISCOUNT_PCT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.PART_CATEGORY,'UNKNOWN') AS PART_CATEGORY_CD,
CASE WHEN SCPSL.ACTIVE =1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ACTIVE_FLG,
COALESCE(SCPSL.MINOR_CONFIGURABLE,'N') AS MINOR_CONFIGURABLE_FLG,
COALESCE(SCPSL.MLB_INDICATOR,'N') AS MLB_INDICATOR_FLG,
COALESCE(SCPSL.TEP_FLG,'N') AS TEP_FLG,
COALESCE(SCPSL.TAA_FLG,'N') AS TAA_FLG,
COALESCE(SCPSL.SW_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS SOFWARE_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SCPSL.TOTAL_COST,0) AS TOTAL_UNIT_COST,
-- COALESCE(SCPSL.EXT_TOTAL_COST,0) AS TOTAL_EXTND_COST,   
CAST(CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.TOTAL_COST, 0) AS FLOAT) * CAST(COALESCE(SCPSL.QUANTITY, 0) AS FLOAT) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS TOTAL_EXTND_COST,
COALESCE(SCPSL.SOURCE_PRODUCT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_PRD_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SCPSL.FULFILLMENT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS FULFILMENT_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SCPSL.CREATED_ON, CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
COALESCE(CAST(SCPSL.CREATED_ON AS DATE), CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_SOURCE_CREATED_DT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.UPDATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SOURCE_LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
COALESCE(CAST(SCPSL.UPDATED_ON AS DATE),CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_SOURCE_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.PART_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_RPTD_PRD_ID,
SCPSL.PART_MAJOR_FAMILY_NAME AS MAJOR_LN_PRD_FAMILY_NAME,
COALESCE(CAST(SCPSL.PART_MAJOR_FAMILY_ID AS VARCHAR(50)),'-999') AS MAJOR_LN_PRD_FAMILY_ID,
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
COALESCE(SCPSL.IS_XAAS_SKU,'UNKNOWN') AS XAAS_PRD_SKU_ID,
COALESCE(NDQL.BK_QUOTE_NUM,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_QUOTE_NUM,
COALESCE(NDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_NUM,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_NUM,
SCPSL.OBJECT_ID AS SK_SCENARIO_LN_OBJ_ID_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(SCPSL.OVERRIDE_ROYALTY_FLG, '=') AS OVERRIDE_ROYALTY_FLG,
COALESCE(SCPSL.OVERRIDE_STANDARD_COST_FLG, '=') AS OVERRIDE_STANDARD_COST_FLG,
COALESCE(SCPSL.OVERRIDE_OVERHEAD_FLG, '=') AS OVERRIDE_OVERHEAD_FLG,
COALESCE(SCPSL.OVERRIDE_LIST_PRICE_FLG, '=') AS OVERRIDE_LIST_PRICE_FLG,
COALESCE(SCPSL.OVERRIDE_EXT_NET_PRICE_FLG, '=') AS OVERRIDE_EXT_NET_PRICE_FLG,
COALESCE(SCPSL.OVERRIDE_DISCOUNT_FLG, '=') AS OVERRIDE_DISCOUNT_FLG,
SCPSL.ERP_PRODUCT_FAMILY AS SRC_RPTD_ERP_PRDT_FMLY_NAME,
COALESCE(SCPSL.CONSTRUCT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS CONSTRUCT_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SCPSL.ATTRIBUTION_METHODOLOGY,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRBTN_METHODOLOGY_CD,
COALESCE(SCPSL.ATTRIBUTION_REQUIRED,'N') AS ATTRBTN_REQ_FLG,
CASE WHEN SCPSL.SINGLE_SKU_LINE_TYPE=1 THEN 'PARENT' WHEN SCPSL.SINGLE_SKU_LINE_TYPE=2 THEN 'CHILD' WHEN SCPSL.SINGLE_SKU_LINE_TYPE IS NULL THEN 'REGULER' ELSE 'REGULER' END AS OFFR_ATTRBTD_LINE_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SCPSL.OA_PROXY_LIST_PRICE, 0) AS OFFR_ATTR_PRXY_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.OA_LIST_PRICE, 0) AS OFFR_ATTRBTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.OA_NET_PRICE, 0) AS OFFR_ATTRBTD_NET_PRC_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(EL_BOM.LOV_SUBTYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS LINE_SUBTYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SCPSL.WF_PRICED,'N') AS WF_PRICED_GDR_FLG,
COALESCE(NDQL.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,-999) AS BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(SCPSL.ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT, 0) AS ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.PROMO_DISC, 0) AS PROMOTIONAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SCPSL.DESCRIPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS PRICING_LINE_DESCR,
COALESCE(EL_BOM.LOV_TYPE, EL_SRC.LOV_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS LOV_LINE_TYPE_CD,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE,
SCPSL.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
-- SCPSL.GLOB_PRC_LST_EXTND_LST_USD_PRC,
SCPSL.GPL_LIST_PRICE as GLOB_PRC_LST_EXTND_LST_USD_PRC,
SCPSL.TOTAL_PURCH_ADJ_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
SCPSL.OA_SUCCESS_FLG,
SCPSL.UI_HIDE_FLG,
SCPSL.SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
SCPSL.PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
SCPSL.CHARGE_TYPE_NAME,
SCPSL.INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
SCPSL.REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
SCPSL.ACTION_TAG_NAME,
SCPSL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME,
SCPSL.RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
SCPSL.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NAME,
SCPSL.AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
SCPSL.PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
SCPSL.RATE_TABLE_NAME,
SCPSL.SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
SCPSL.SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
SCPSL.SUBSCRPITION_START_DT,
SCPSL.USAGE_QUANTITY,
SCPSL.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
SCPSL.COUNTRY_ENABLMENT_COST_USD_AMT,
SCPSL.SERVICE_USD_COST,
COALESCE(SCPSL.NOAH_FLAG,'N') AS NOAH_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
COALESCE(SMPSL.PRICING_SCENARIO_LN_KEY,-999) AS XAAS_COM_PRC_SCENARIO_LINE_KEY
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CQ_PUBLISHED_SCEN_LINE SCPSL
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_PRICING_SCENARIO_LINE SPSL
ON SPSL.SK_SCENARIO_LN_OBJ_ID_INT = SCPSL.OBJECT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_PRICING_SCENARIO_LINE SMPSL
on SMPSL.SK_SCENARIO_LN_OBJ_ID_INT = SCPSL.XAAS_COMMITED_PARENT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_PRICING_SCENARIO_LINE SP
ON SP.SK_SCENARIO_LN_OBJ_ID_INT = SCPSL.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_PRICING_SCENARIO NPS
ON NPS.SK_SCENARIO_ID_INT= SCPSL.SCENARIO_OBJECT_ID
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL ND
ON CAST(ND.BK_DEAL_ID AS VARCHAR(50)) = CAST(NPS.BK_DEAL_ID AS VARCHAR(50))
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID =SCPSL.PART_NUMBER
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE NDQL
ON NDQL.SK_QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID_INT = SCPSL.REFERENCE_LINE_OBJECT_ID
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_LOV EL_BOM  ON EL_BOM.LOV_INDEX=SCPSL.LINE_TYPE AND EL_BOM.LOV_TYPE = 'BOM_LINE_TYPE' AND EL_BOM.ACTIVE = 1 
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_LOV EL_SRC  ON EL_SRC.LOV_INDEX=SCPSL.SOURCE_TYPE  AND EL_SRC.LOV_TYPE = 'LINE_SOURCE_TYPE' AND EL_SRC.ACTIVE = 1

SELECT SCPSL.DEAL_ID, SCPSL.OBJECT_ID, SCPSL.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID, SCPSL.SCENARIO_OBJECT_ID,
   SCPSL.LINE_NUMBER, SCPSL.SOURCE_TYPE, SCPSL.LINE_TYPE, SCPSL.PART_NUMBER,
   SCPSL.PART_CATEGORY, SCPSL.DESCRIPTION, SCPSL.QUANTITY, SCPSL.DURATION,
   SCPSL.REFERENCE_LIST_PRICE, SCPSL.LIST_PRICE, SCPSL.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE,
   SCPSL.DISCOUNT_RATE, SCPSL.NS_DISCOUNT_RATE, SCPSL.DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE,
   SCPSL.NS_DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE, SCPSL.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT, SCPSL.NS_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT,
   SCPSL.NET_PRICE, SCPSL.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE, SCPSL.STANDARD_COST,
   SCPSL.EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST, SCPSL.OVERHEAD, SCPSL.EXTENDED_OVERHEAD,
   SCPSL.ROYALTY, SCPSL.EXTENDED_ROYALTY, SCPSL.ROYALTY_EXPRESSION,
   SCPSL.SOURCE_LINE_ID, SCPSL.PARENT_SOURCE_LINE_ID, SCPSL.MINOR_CONFIGURABLE,
   SCPSL.PART_MAJOR_FAMILY_ID, SCPSL.PART_MAJOR_FAMILY_NAME, SCPSL.SOURCE_OBJECT_ID,
   SCPSL.REFERENCE_LINE_OBJECT_ID, SCPSL.STATUS, SCPSL.STATUS_MESSAGE,
   SCPSL.ACTIVE, SCPSL.CREATED_BY, SCPSL.CREATED_ON, SCPSL.UPDATED_BY,
   SCPSL.UPDATED_ON, SCPSL.GPL_LIST_PRICE, SCPSL.UPLIFT_FACTOR,
   SCPSL.EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_EXCLUDE_MYD, SCPSL.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD,
   SCPSL.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_NS, SCPSL.FINAL_DISC, SCPSL.FINAL_NET_PRICE,
   SCPSL.ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT, SCPSL.NEGOTIATED_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   SCPSL.NEGOTIATED_DISCOUNT, SCPSL.NEGOTIATED_NS_DISCOUNT, SCPSL.SW_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE,
   SCPSL.MLB_INDICATOR, SCPSL.CONTRACTUAL_DISC, SCPSL.ERP_PRODUCT_FAMILY,
   SCPSL.TOTAL_COST, SCPSL.EXT_TOTAL_COST, SCPSL.FA_DISC_APPROVED,
   SCPSL.TEP_FLG, SCPSL.TAA_FLG, SCPSL.FULFILLMENT_TYPE, SCPSL.EXT_LIST_PRICE,
   SCPSL.SOURCE_PRODUCT_TYPE, SCPSL.IS_XAAS_SKU, SCPSL.SBP_FLAG,
   SCPSL.SBP_LINE_OBJECT_ID, SCPSL.DECIMAL_EXPANSION_VALUE ,
 SCPSL.SSVW_UPDATED_ON,
 SCPSL.OVERRIDE_ROYALTY_FLG,          
 SCPSL.OVERRIDE_STANDARD_COST_FLG,    
 SCPSL.OVERRIDE_OVERHEAD_FLG,         
 SCPSL.OVERRIDE_LIST_PRICE_FLG,      
 SCPSL.OVERRIDE_EXT_NET_PRICE_FLG,  
 SCPSL.OVERRIDE_DISCOUNT_FLG,
 /*added below 7 columns as part of EPS_HANA_DEAL_FOUNDATION*/
 SCPSL.CONSTRUCT_TYPE,
 SCPSL.ATTRIBUTION_METHODOLOGY,
 SCPSL.SINGLE_SKU_LINE_TYPE,
 SCPSL.ATTRIBUTION_REQUIRED,
 SCPSL.OA_PROXY_LIST_PRICE,
 SCPSL.OA_LIST_PRICE,
 SCPSL.OA_NET_PRICE,
 SCPSL.WF_PRICED,
 SCPSL.PROMO_DISC,
 /*added below 24 columns as part of PRICING SCENARIO LINE ENHANCEMENTS*/
 SCPSL.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
 SCPSL.GLOB_PRC_LST_EXTND_LST_USD_PRC,
 SCPSL.TOTAL_PURCH_ADJ_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
 SCPSL.OA_SUCCESS_FLG,
 SCPSL.UI_HIDE_FLG,
 SCPSL.SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
 SCPSL.PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 SCPSL.CHARGE_TYPE_NAME,
 SCPSL.INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 SCPSL.REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 SCPSL.ACTION_TAG_NAME,
 SCPSL.BILLING_MODEL_NAME,
 SCPSL.RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
 SCPSL.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NAME,
 SCPSL.AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 SCPSL.PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 SCPSL.RATE_TABLE_NAME,
 SCPSL.SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
 SCPSL.SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
 SCPSL.SUBSCRPITION_START_DT,
 SCPSL.USAGE_QUANTITY,
 SCPSL.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
 SCPSL.COUNTRY_ENABLMENT_COST_USD_AMT,
 SCPSL.SERVICE_USD_COST,
 SCPSL.NOAH_FLAG,
 SCPSL.XAAS_COMMITED_PARENT_ID,
 SCPSL.SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID AS SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
 SCPSL.EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD AS EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
 SCPSL.SS_CODE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_CQ_PUBLISHED_SCEN_LINE SCPSL
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE NDQL 
 WHERE NDQL.SK_QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID_INT = SCPSL.REFERENCE_LINE_OBJECT_ID
 AND NDQL.SS_CODE ='CCW')
AND SCPSL.SS_CODE='CCW'    
UNION ALL
SELECT SCPSLU.DEAL_ID, SCPSLU.OBJECT_ID, SCPSLU.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID, SCPSLU.SCENARIO_OBJECT_ID,
   SCPSLU.LINE_NUMBER, SCPSLU.SOURCE_TYPE, SCPSLU.LINE_TYPE, SCPSLU.PART_NUMBER,
   SCPSLU.PART_CATEGORY, SCPSLU.DESCRIPTION, SCPSLU.QUANTITY, SCPSLU.DURATION,

   SCPSLU.DISCOUNT_RATE, SCPSLU.NS_DISCOUNT_RATE, SCPSLU.DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE,
   SCPSLU.NS_DISCOUNT_PERCENTAGE, SCPSLU.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT, SCPSLU.NS_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT,
   SCPSLU.NET_PRICE, SCPSLU.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE, SCPSLU.STANDARD_COST,
   SCPSLU.EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST, SCPSLU.OVERHEAD, SCPSLU.EXTENDED_OVERHEAD,

   SCPSLU.SOURCE_LINE_ID, SCPSLU.PARENT_SOURCE_LINE_ID, SCPSLU.MINOR_CONFIGURABLE,
   SCPSLU.PART_MAJOR_FAMILY_ID, SCPSLU.PART_MAJOR_FAMILY_NAME, SCPSLU.SOURCE_OBJECT_ID,
   SCPSLU.REFERENCE_LINE_OBJECT_ID, SCPSLU.STATUS, SCPSLU.STATUS_MESSAGE,
   SCPSLU.ACTIVE, SCPSLU.CREATED_BY, SCPSLU.CREATED_ON, SCPSLU.UPDATED_BY,
   SCPSLU.UPDATED_ON, SCPSLU.GPL_LIST_PRICE, SCPSLU.UPLIFT_FACTOR,
   SCPSLU.EXT_NET_PRICE_AMT_EXCLUDE_MYD, SCPSLU.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_STD,
   SCPSLU.TRADE_IN_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT_NS, SCPSLU.FINAL_DISC, SCPSLU.FINAL_NET_PRICE,
   SCPSLU.ADDITIONAL_UNIT_CREDIT_AMT, SCPSLU.NEGOTIATED_NET_PRICE_AMT,
   SCPSLU.NEGOTIATED_DISCOUNT, SCPSLU.NEGOTIATED_NS_DISCOUNT, SCPSLU.SW_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE,
   SCPSLU.MLB_INDICATOR, SCPSLU.CONTRACTUAL_DISC, SCPSLU.ERP_PRODUCT_FAMILY,
   SCPSLU.TOTAL_COST, SCPSLU.EXT_TOTAL_COST, SCPSLU.FA_DISC_APPROVED,
   SCPSLU.TEP_FLG, SCPSLU.TAA_FLG, SCPSLU.FULFILLMENT_TYPE, SCPSLU.EXT_LIST_PRICE,
   SCPSLU.SOURCE_PRODUCT_TYPE, SCPSLU.IS_XAAS_SKU, SCPSLU.SBP_FLAG,
   SCPSLU.SBP_LINE_OBJECT_ID, SCPSLU.DECIMAL_EXPANSION_VALUE ,
 SCPSLU.SSVW_UPDATED_ON,
 SCPSLU.OVERRIDE_ROYALTY_FLG,          
 SCPSLU.OVERRIDE_STANDARD_COST_FLG,    
 SCPSLU.OVERRIDE_OVERHEAD_FLG,         
 SCPSLU.OVERRIDE_LIST_PRICE_FLG,      
 SCPSLU.OVERRIDE_EXT_NET_PRICE_FLG,  
 SCPSLU.OVERRIDE_DISCOUNT_FLG,
 SCPSLU.CONSTRUCT_TYPE,
 SCPSLU.ATTRIBUTION_METHODOLOGY,
 SCPSLU.SINGLE_SKU_LINE_TYPE,
 SCPSLU.ATTRIBUTION_REQUIRED,
 SCPSLU.OA_PROXY_LIST_PRICE,
 SCPSLU.OA_LIST_PRICE,
 SCPSLU.OA_NET_PRICE,
 SCPSLU.WF_PRICED,
 SCPSLU.PROMO_DISC,
 SCPSLU.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
 SCPSLU.GLOB_PRC_LST_EXTND_LST_USD_PRC,
 SCPSLU.TOTAL_PURCH_ADJ_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
 SCPSLU.OA_SUCCESS_FLG,
 SCPSLU.UI_HIDE_FLG,
 SCPSLU.SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
 SCPSLU.PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 SCPSLU.CHARGE_TYPE_NAME,
 SCPSLU.INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 SCPSLU.REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 SCPSLU.ACTION_TAG_NAME,
 SCPSLU.BILLING_MODEL_NAME,
 SCPSLU.RATE_TABLE_URL_ADDR,
 SCPSLU.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NAME,
 SCPSLU.AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 SCPSLU.PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
 SCPSLU.RATE_TABLE_NAME,
 SCPSLU.SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
 SCPSLU.SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
 SCPSLU.SUBSCRPITION_START_DT,
 SCPSLU.USAGE_QUANTITY,
 SCPSLU.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
 SCPSLU.COUNTRY_ENABLMENT_COST_USD_AMT,

 SCPSLU.EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD AS EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
 SCPSLU.SS_CODE
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_CQ_PUBLISHED_SCEN_LINE SCPSLU
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LN_VW_RNWL_KFKA EL 
 WHERE EL.QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID = SCPSLU.REFERENCE_LINE_OBJECT_ID)
 AND SCPSLU.SS_CODE='CCWR'

SELECT 
RANK() OVER(ORDER BY STG.OBJECT_ID)+ KEY_SRC.MAX_VAL PRICING_SCENARIO_LN_KEY,
STG.OBJECT_ID AS SK_SCENARIO_LN_OBJ_ID_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM
(SELECT
DISTINCT OBJECT_ID 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CQ_PUBLISHED_SCEN_LINE) STG,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(PRICING_SCENARIO_LN_KEY),10000) MAX_VAL FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_PRICING_SCENARIO_LINE
)KEY_SRC
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM 
$$ETLVWDB.SM_PRICING_SCENARIO_LINE SPSL
WHERE 
SPSL.SK_SCENARIO_LN_OBJ_ID_INT = STG.OBJECT_ID
)

SELECT 
SCPSL.DEAL_ID,
SCPSL.OBJECT_ID, SCPSL.PARENT_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
SCPSL.SCENARIO_OBJECT_ID, SCPSL.LINE_NUMBER,

SCPSL.FA_DISC_APPROVED, SCPSL.TEP_FLG,

SCPSL.ATTRIBUTION_METHODOLOGY,
SCPSL.SINGLE_SKU_LINE_TYPE,
SCPSL.ATTRIBUTION_REQUIRED,

SCPSL.OA_LIST_PRICE,
SCPSL.OA_NET_PRICE,

/*added below 24 columns as part of PRICING SCENARIO LINE ENHANCEMENTS*/
SCPSL.ADDITIONAL_ITEM_INFO_TXT,
SCPSL.GLOB_PRC_LST_EXTND_LST_USD_PRC,
SCPSL.TOTAL_PURCH_ADJ_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
SCPSL.OA_SUCCESS_FLG,
SCPSL.UI_HIDE_FLG,
SCPSL.SOA_SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE_CD,
SCPSL.PRICING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
SCPSL.CHARGE_TYPE_NAME,
SCPSL.INITIAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
SCPSL.REMAINING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,

SCPSL.UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT_NAME,
SCPSL.AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
SCPSL.PREPAY_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,

SCPSL.SBP_SUBSCRIPTION_ID,
SCPSL.SUBSCRIPTION_END_DT,
SCPSL.SUBSCRPITION_START_DT,

SCPSL.SUBSCRIPTION_CREDIT_USD_AMT,
SCPSL.COUNTRY_ENABLMENT_COST_USD_AMT,

SCPSL.XAAS_COMMITED_PARENT_ID,

SCPSL.EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD AS EFFECTIVE_DISC_STD,
SCPSL.SS_CODE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CQ_PUBLISHED_SCEN_LINE SCPSL
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS(

FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_PRICING_SCENARIO NPS 
WHERE NPS.SK_SCENARIO_ID_INT = SCPSL.SCENARIO_OBJECT_ID)
